channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Barcelona Close In On La Liga Title After Hard-Fought Win Over Osasuna
item.description: Barcelona don move very close to retaining their La Liga title after dem beat Osasuna 2-1 for away ground. The match no easy at all, especially for first half where Barcelona control possession but st...

item.title: Ask.com, the search engine formerly known as Ask Jeeves, closes after 25 years
item.description: Ask.com, the search engine and Q&A platform originally known as Ask Jeeves, has officially shut down as of May 1, 2026. Launched in 1996, Ask Jeeves aimed to provide answers to user questions in natur...

item.title: Manzi wa Mombasa Opens Up About Past Heartbreak and Her Current Relationship
item.description: Manzi wa Mombasa, a popular TikToker, recently shared personal details about her love life and reasons for dating women, despite being a mother of three. She revealed that a past heartbreak caused by ...

item.title: Obidient Movement assures Obi remains engaged in political consultations amid ADC crisis
item.description: The Obidient Movement don beg all Obidients make dem calm down following tori wey dey circulate say Peter Obi fit comot go join Nigeria Democratic Congress (NDC). As dem dey, crisis dey inside African...

item.title: 19-year-old charged following evacuation of Peter Kay show due to false bomb threat
item.description: A 19-year-old man, Omar Majed, has been charged with making false communications related to a bomb hoax at the Utilita Arena in Birmingham during a Peter Kay performance on Friday evening. The comedia...

item.title: Mother and Baby Found Dead in Suspected Poisoning Case in Soweto
item.description: A 41-year-old mother, Nasiphi Dutywa, and her nine-month-old daughter, Ovayo, were found dead in their Soweto home on 9 April 2026, prompting a grieving family to call for a thorough investigation. Na...

item.title: Hochul urges federal action over ICE agent reassignment in New York
item.description: Governor Kathy Hochul sent a letter to White House border czar Tom Homan asking for confirmation about whether an Immigration and Customs Enforcement officer involved in a fatal shooting has been reas...

item.title: Master Hanz Cua’s Feng Shui Predictions for May 2026
item.description: Master Hanz Cua, a renowned feng shui expert, shares his predictions for May 3, 2026. As always, Cua’s insights provide guidance based on Chinese astrology and feng shui practices, offering advice on ...

item.description: In a recent segment of ABS-CBN's popular show 'Everybody Sing,' Vice Ganda discussed possible solutions to the recurring flooding problem in the Philippines under the hypothetical scenario of being pr...

item.title: New portrait of Princess Charlotte released to mark her 11th birthday
item.description: A new portrait of Princess Charlotte has been shared to celebrate her 11th birthday, giving the public a fresh look at the young royal. The photo, posted on the official social media accounts of the P...

item.title: Today's Word Focus: 'Alarming'
item.description: For May 3, 2026, the featured 'Word of the Day' is 'alarming.' ABS-CBN Lifestyle presents this daily word segment to help readers expand their vocabulary while highlighting words that are relevant in ...

item.title: Retiring Jockey Patrick Husbands Reflects on Career and Looks Forward to Exploring the World
item.description: Patrick Husbands, widely regarded as one of Canada's greatest jockeys, has retired after a remarkable career spanning more than three decades. Born in Barbados, Husbands began riding almost as soon as...

item.title: Zozibini Tunzi Joins Top Billing and Reflects on Beauty, Culture, and Marriage
item.description: Zozibini Tunzi, the former Miss Universe, has made her debut as a presenter on the newly revamped Top Billing, marking a significant milestone in her post-pageant career. Known for championing natural...

item.title: Arsenal secure 3-0 victory over Fulham with Gyökeres and Saka starring
item.description: Arsenal delivered a commanding 3-0 victory over Fulham at the Emirates Stadium, with Viktor Gyökeres scoring twice and Bukayo Saka producing a standout performance. Saka, returning from a brief injury...

item.title: GT batting coach Kapoor backs top‑order to stick to solid, traditional cricket approach
item.description: Gujarat Titans batting coach Aashish Kapoor explains that the franchise’s top‑order batters are encouraged to stick to a disciplined, technically sound style of batting instead of going for risky, fla...

item.title: 15-year-old arrested after street fight in Southend leaves two teenagers injured
item.description: A 15-year-old boy has been arrested in connection with a substantial street fight in Southend that resulted in two teenagers being hospitalised. The altercation involved multiple youths and caused sig...

item.title: PNP Chief Promises Justice for Injured Police Officers in May 1 Protests
item.description: The Philippine National Police (PNP) has vowed to pursue justice for the seven police officers injured during the Labor Day protests in Metro Manila on May 1, 2026. PNP Chief Gen. Jose Melencio Nartat...

item.title: Iran waits for US decision on diplomacy or renewed conflict
item.description: Amid ongoing tensions in the Middle East, Iran has stated that the decision now lies with the United States to either pursue diplomacy or escalate hostilities. The US recently rejected a new Iranian p...

item.title: Rapid Population Growth and Housing Demand Transform Wagga Wagga
item.description: Wagga Wagga in New South Wales has become one of Australia's fastest-growing property markets, driven by affordability and lifestyle changes. The city, previously a quiet regional hub of around 60,000...

item.title: India develops nuclear reactor with potential for long-term energy security
item.description: India has made a significant breakthrough in nuclear energy technology with its latest reactor development. This new reactor has the potential to provide the country with energy security for centuries...
